providers.name: GitHub Copilot
providers.popularityBasis: Largest public user signal among covered tools.

providers.name: Cursor
providers.popularityBasis: Large AI editor adoption and native project rules.

providers.name: Claude Code
providers.popularityBasis: Major agentic coding tool with project memory, skills, commands, and subagents.

providers.name: OpenAI Codex
providers.popularityBasis: Native AGENTS.md workflow and strong public open-source repository signal.

providers.name: Cline
providers.popularityBasis: Popular open-source VS Code autonomous coding agent.

providers.name: Augment Code
providers.popularityBasis: Commercial AI coding assistant with workspace rules, subagents, AGENTS.md, and review guidelines.

providers.name: Kilo Code
providers.popularityBasis: Popular open-source VS Code agent with project rules and JSONC instructions.

providers.name: Google Antigravity
providers.popularityBasis: Google agent-first IDE with GEMINI.md, AGENTS.md, rules, and workflows.

providers.name: Factory AI
providers.popularityBasis: Factory Droids use AGENTS.md plus Factory rules, skills, commands, and custom droids.

providers.name: Generic Agent Skills
providers.popularityBasis: Tool-agnostic skill roots used by multi-agent teams.
